song.title: II Timothy 1:6-8
song.author: Goshen saints
song.lyrics: [V] .G 1For which cause I remind you 2Therefore do not be ashamed . D 1To fan into flame the gift of God 2of the testimony of our Lord . Am D7 1Which is in you, Which is in you 2Nor of me, His prisoner . G 1Through the laying on of my hands. 2But suffer evil with the gospel [C] .G For God has not given us . G7 C A spirit of cowardice . G But of power and of love . Am D7 G - C - G And of a sober mind
